mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO match_comment (
commentno, matchno, memberno, parentno, content, comment_type, likecnt, reportcnt, is_secret, is_deleted, rdate
)
VALUES (
match_comment_seq.nextval,
#{matchno},
#{memberno},
#{parentno, jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{content},
#{comment_type},
0,
0,
'N',
'N',
SYSDATE
)
mapper.select:
SELECT
mc.commentno, mc.matchno, mc.memberno, mc.parentno, mc.content, mc.comment_type, mc.likecnt, mc.reportcnt, mc.is_secret, mc.is_deleted, mc.rdate,
m.nickname, m.profile AS profile_img, m.manner_temp
FROM match_comment mc
INNER JOIN member m ON mc.memberno = m.memberno
WHERE mc.matchno = #{value} AND mc.is_deleted = 'N'
ORDER BY
CASE WHEN mc.parentno IS NULL THEN mc.commentno ELSE mc.parentno END ASC,
mc.commentno ASC

SELECT
mc.commentno, mc.matchno, mc.memberno, mc.parentno, mc.content, mc.comment_type, mc.likecnt, mc.reportcnt, mc.is_secret, mc.is_deleted, mc.rdate,
m.nickname, m.profile AS profile_img, m.manner_temp
FROM match_comment mc
INNER JOIN member m ON mc.memberno = m.memberno
WHERE mc.parentno = #{value} AND mc.is_deleted = 'N'
ORDER BY mc.commentno ASC

SELECT
mc.commentno, mc.matchno, mc.memberno, mc.parentno, mc.content, mc.comment_type, mc.likecnt, mc.reportcnt, mc.is_secret, mc.is_deleted, mc.rdate,
m.nickname, m.profile AS profile_img, m.manner_temp
FROM match_comment mc
INNER JOIN member m ON mc.memberno = m.memberno
WHERE mc.commentno = #{value}

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM match_comment
WHERE matchno = #{value} AND is_deleted = 'N'

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM match_comment
WHERE memberno = #{value} AND is_deleted = 'N'
mapper.update:
UPDATE match_comment
SET likecnt =
CASE WHEN likecnt > 0 THEN likecnt - 1 ELSE 0 END
WHERE commentno = #{value}
